project_type: Next.js 14.2.5 production site with TypeScript and Tailwind
test_framework: No test framework configured - validation is lint + build
build_command: npm run lint && npm run build
test_command: npm run lint && npm run build
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run lint to check for linting errors. 2. Run npm run build to verify Next.js compiles successfully. 3. Confirm tools/trading-chef-studio/ is excluded from TypeScript/Next.js compilation.
environment_constraints: Network is repos-only (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY). Cannot npm install new packages. All repos are already cloned locally. Use github power for pushing.
contribution_requirements: Branch naming: ops/NNN-description. Commits explain the change clearly. Do NOT modify existing routes or code.
key_patterns: next.config.js uses module.exports CommonJS. tsconfig.json excludes node_modules only. ESLint extends next/core-web-vitals. Scripts live in scripts/ directory. Docs live in docs/ directory.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router pages, components/ - React components, lib/ - utilities, docs/ - documentation, scripts/ - ops scripts, public/ - static assets, src/ - source code modules
